JSON Schema contracts for runtime manifests, authoring manifests, design artifacts and related architecture data.
game-authoring.schema.json: JSON Schema for editable game authoring manifests compiled into runtime game.manifest.json files.
manifest-authoring-common.schema.json: Shared JSON Schema definitions for ADR-030 authoring manifests and source maps.
manifest-source-map.schema.json: JSON Schema for tooling-only source map companion files generated next to runtime manifests.
ui-authoring.schema.json: JSON Schema for editable UI authoring manifests compiled into channel-specific ui.manifest.json files.
